artifact_refs.description: Evidence-only notebook used to inspect the Porto data and freeze a plain-language shortlist before bank alignment.
Authoritative shortlist-to-bank mapping for the Porto human baseline.
Author notes for the Porto human baseline.
Run-level metadata for the Porto human baseline.
Links each selected bank action to notebook evidence or worksheet sections.

notes: Manual Porto TC1 baseline. The final selection stops at sentinel cleanup, sparse-column pruning, calc drop, and id drop, while leaving the typed imputation branch out of the baseline.
